schema.description: Response to the get administration logs statistics request.

totalUniqueDevices.description: The amount of unique devices that caused an administration log.

administrationLogs.description: An array of administration logs stats.

day.description: The timestamp value of the day of the administration log.

amount.description: The amount of administration logs received on the specified day.

schema.title: Get Administration Logs Statistics

schema.description: An API error response in case of an HTTP Unauthorized Request.
schema.title: Unauthorized Request

schema.description: An API error response in case of an HTTP Forbidden Request.
schema.title: Forbidden Request

schema.description: An API error response in case of a Server Side Error.

errors.description: List of errors encountered while calling the API.

schema.title: Server Error
